item.description:
Fantasy Football Scout @FFScout · 25s If you want to buy an FPL asset BEFORE they haul instead of after, then you're in the right place
These players are due a goal or an assist in FPL GW33 De fantasyfootballscout.co.uk 50

item.title: footballontnt: Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 3min Diego Simeone has never lost a home knockout Champions League game as manag
item.description:
Football on TNT Sports @footballontnt · 3min Diego Simeone has never lost a home knockout Champions League game as manager, registering 11 wins and 6 draws
Atletico have not lost a home UCL knockout match at home since 1997 8 6 7 24 1 mil

item.title: TheAthleticFC: The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 5min Napoli owner and movie mogul Aurelio De Laurentiis has ideas about what ne
item.description:
The Athletic | Football @TheAthleticFC · 5min Napoli owner and movie mogul Aurelio De Laurentiis has ideas about what needs to change in football. Lots of them.
So he invited @AdamCrafton_ to his home in Beverley Hills to share them.
25-minutes halves No red and yellow cards, just sin bins U.S. teams in the Mostrar más 2 3 18 2 mil
